title: VINOD Stainless Steel Turkish Coffee Pot, Warmer Melting Pot, Butter Milk Warmer Sauce - Capacity: 450 ml
description: Product Description From the manufacturer This Turkish coffee pot is classy and adds a unique touch to your kitchen! It is made with good quality stainless steel. This coffee maker maintains the original aroma of Turkish coffee. It is versatile and you can use it for making delicious coffee! The coffee pot body is made of tough and durable steel and it comes with an ergonomic heat resistant handle. You can use it on gas, electric, ceramic stoves and also on hot sand. A pouring mouth helps to drop liquids with ease. Your loved ones will love your coffee made in this lovely Turkish coffee pot. 7 Reasons You Will Love This Turkish Coffee Pot ✔ Traditional Turkish Coffee Maker with black handle ✔ It is an ideal choice for those who love making coffee or melting butter, heating milk or chocolate. ✔ Modern and unique design ✔ Made with quality stainless steel ✔ A long and sturdy handle that prevents burns ✔ You can use this coffee pot warmer for multi purposes. ✔ It is easy to clean and dishwasher safe. ✔ Made in Turkey. Multifunctional Coffee Pot This Turkish Coffee Pot is a must-have accessory for every household! It is not just a coffee maker or milk warmer, you can do much more. You can use it to melt butter, warm tea, hot chocolate, make sauces, gravies, steam and frot milk and more. Capacity: 10.14 fl oz (300 ml) and much more are available This Turkish coffee pot has a pour spout which helps you to pour liquids easily. It makes a lovely present for Birthdays, Christmas, Mother's Day, Housewarming and more. Also this coffee pot will be a great gift for coffee lovers. A Turkish Words: 'The memory of a good cup of Turkish coffee lasts 40 years.' Did you ever tried to make the delicious Turkish coffee? It is one of the most popular traditional drinks in Turkey. To create the Turkish coffee ritual, it is served with a glass of water and Turkish Delights by the side. Turkish coffee is a drink of friendship and taking pleasure in small things in life. Enjoy your cup of coffee!
